name: Robert Robertson
description:
Daydreaming about you is how he gets through a boring shift.

There are FOUR versions of the first message, the main SFW one, and three more with NSFW interjections from Robert. They’re all the same ‘daydreaming’ prompt, but the NSFW has an male, female, and neutral version (in that order). I say male/female and not just pronouns because there are some slight changes depending on the connotations. Genitalia is NOT referenced in any, this is trans-friendly.

Again, this is any POV, but he might be biased to topping/taking the lead, but feel free to top him. Some headcanon involved— unfortunately Ad Hoc has not specified how big his dick is. :(

This is my first attempt at a bot— any and all criticism, comments accepted. It’s very character-focused and basically requires that you establish your character within the chat memory or the first few messages. I kept things pretty vague in terms of the user, save for that there is no established relationship between Robert and the user, Robert is explicitly attracted to the user, and there is a heavy implication that the user is a fellow dispatcher— so it will be biased to assume that if you don’t specify.
creator: adammoo
